overview: Esper Reanimator is a Modern combo deck that leverages graveyard recursion to cast high-impact threats like Archon of Cruelty for free. It blends disruptive interaction with efficient tutoring to bypass opponent defenses and close games quickly. The W/U/B color identity provides robust card advantage and board control to protect the reanimation engine.
win_conditions: Casting Archon of Cruelty from the graveyard to clear the board and deal lethal damage
Using Emeritus of Ideation to tutor for reanimation spells or finishers
Repeatedly reanimating cheap creatures to overwhelm opponents with card advantage

keep_criteria: Hands with Thoughtseize and a reanimation spell or cheap creature
Two-card hands containing a tutor and a finisher
Hands with multiple cheap interaction spells to stabilize early
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking interaction or graveyard recursion
Hands with only high-cost permanents and no early plays
Hands missing lands or with unplayable mana bases

early_game: Play cheap creatures to fuel the graveyard and apply early pressure
Use Thoughtseize to remove key threats or tutor for reanimation pieces
Set up mana efficiently while holding up interaction for aggro or control
mid_game: Activate Emeritus of Ideation to find reanimation spells or board wipes
Cast reanimation spells on the opponent's turn to bypass counterspells and flash triggers
Clear opposing boards with Archon of Cruelty to establish dominance
late_game: Stabilize against sweepers by keeping reanimation spells in hand
Cycle through the deck to find additional finishers or disruption
Apply consistent pressure with recurring threats until the opponent runs out of resources

key_cards.name: Emeritus of Ideation
key_cards.notes: Use to find reanimation spells or finishers, and to put creatures into play on the opponent's turn to avoid interaction.

key_cards.name: Archon of Cruelty
key_cards.notes: Reanimate this to wipe opposing boards and deal 1 damage to all creatures, often setting up lethal or clearing the path to victory.

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Play early to remove key threats or dig for reanimation pieces, ensuring the combo engine stays protected.

sequencing_tips: Hold Thoughtseize until you see a key threat or need to tutor for a reanimation spell
Flash Archon of Cruelty on the opponent's turn to clear their board before they can attack or cast spells
Use Emeritus of Ideation to tutor for reanimation spells only when you have the mana and graveyard targets ready
Prioritize keeping reanimation spells in hand to respond to sweepers or board wipes

matchups.advice: Prioritize early disruption and reanimate cheap creatures to stall until you can cast Archon of Cruelty.
Play around counterspells by flashing threats on their turn and using multiple cheap creatures to force removal.
Disrupt their key threats early and reanimate finishers before they can establish a board presence.
